name: Central
approxRentRange: $2,300-$3,100/mo (2BR/2BA; one live unit listed at $3,027; overall building range across all unit types cited as $1,648-$5,155; contact property for current availability)
bathroomsNote: Studios and 1BR units have 1 bath; 2BR units have 2 baths (confirmed from floor plan data showing 2BR/2BA)
notes: 243-unit mixed-use apartment building; 21,500 sq ft of ground-floor retail and restaurants; built 2017; 6 stories

Property markets '24/7 Concierge Services' but at least one resident review (ApartmentRatings) states front desk is unstaffed after 10pm 'quite frequently'; doorman status set to Likely staffed rather than Confirmed 24h
Concierge staff named in positive reviews (Laura/Lauren, Tina, overnight team praised); daytime staffing appears reliable
Dogs and cats allowed; dog grooming area and on-site pet spa; no weight limit confirmed; specific fees not published
24-hour gym; outdoor pool with sundeck; rooftop lounge; multimedia clubroom; landscaped courtyard
Package receiving: Secure Package Concierge Lockers with outgoing package drop-off
In-unit washer/dryer and air conditioning listed as unit amenities, implying resident-controlled climate
Maintenance reviews are mixed: custodial team praised by some; at least one reviewer noted hallway wall scuffs inconsistent with luxury positioning; wellMaintained set to Unclear
Managed by Bozzuto; also listed at bozzuto.com/apartments-for-rent/md/silver-spring/central
Alternate leasing phone: (833) 682-0123; office hours Mon-Thu 9am-6pm, Fri 8am-5pm, Sat 10am-5pm, Sun closed
Sources: apartmentadvisor.com, apartmentlist.com, apartmentratings.com (resident reviews), apartmentfinder.com, bozzuto.com, web search aggregates June 2026
